title: baqash #1245
definition:
1) to seek, require, desire, exact, request
    1a) (Piel)
        1a1) to seek to find
        1a2) to seek to secure
        1a3) to seek the face
        1a4) to desire, demand
        1a5) to require, exact
        1a6) to ask, request
    1b) (Pual) to be sought
